zh.lifeSummary: 當Mechthild von Cuyk-Arnsberg於大約1240年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇賀爾左圖姆 維斯特法倫阿斯格時，她的父親Gottfried III. von Arnsberg36歲，母親Adelheid von Blieskastel17歲。她和Heinrich III. von Waldeck至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1298年8月13日之後在瓦爾德可瓦爾德可。

meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Mechthild
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Mechthild von Cuyk-Arnsberg was born about 1240, in Arnsberg, Herzogtum Westfalen, Holy Roman Empire, her father, Gottfried III. von Arnsberg, was 36 and her mother, Adelheid von Blieskastel, was 17. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Heinrich III. von Waldeck. She died after 13 August 1298, in Waldeck, Waldeck.

Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Heinrich III. von Waldeck. Elle est décédée après 13 août 1298, à Waldeck, Waldeck.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mechthild von Cuyk-Arnsberg um 1240 in Arnsberg, Herzogtum Westfalen, Heiliges Römisches Reich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gottfried III. von Arnsberg 36 und ihre Mutter Adelheid von Blieskastel 17. Sie hatte mit Heinrich III. von Waldeck mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 13. August 1298 in Waldeck, Waldeck.

ko.lifeSummary: Mechthild von Cuyk-Arnsberg(이)가 대략 1240년 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 허초그투 웨스트파렌 아른스버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gottfried III. von Arnsberg(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelheid von Blieskastel(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 Heinrich III. von Waldeck(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1298년 8월 13일 이후 월덱 월덱에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mechthild von Cuyk-Arnsberg родилась около 1240 г. в местности арнсбирг, хирзогтум вестфеилен, хилигесь рoмищесь раич, её отцу по имени Gottfried III. von Arnsberg было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelheid von Blieskastel, 17. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Heinrich III. von Waldeck. Она умерла после 13 августа 1298 г. в местности валдекк, валдекк.
